name: PUP
description: PUP is a community-driven meme coin built on the Binance Smart Chain (BSC). It features an adorable puppy mascot wearing a cap with the iconic Binance symbol — a fun and clever reference to the popular visual meme where flipping the BNB logo upside down creates 'PUP'. This playful concept has quickly captured widespread attention and enthusiasm across the crypto community, blending humor, cuteness and Binance ecosystem vibes into one viral token.
